title: Find My Device - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device location permission icons persist after app restart when "Allow while using app" is selected
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the Find My Device feature.
4. When prompted for location permission, tap "Allow while using app".
5. Observe that the Location and Geo icons become visible on the screen.
6. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app completely.
7. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Tap on the Find My Device feature again.
expected: After restarting the app, the user should be asked for location consent again when accessing Find My Device, since the permission was only granted "while using the app" and a fresh app launch constitutes a new usage session.
